site.name: Liozu Villa
site.slogan: A Private Garden Villa · Slow Down and Unwind
site.description: Rice fields sway in the breeze beneath blue skies and white clouds — a rare sense of calm and ease. Come let nature recharge you.
site.address: No. 6, Ln. 189, Sec. 2, Dongshan Rd., Dongshan Township, Yilan County, Taiwan

seo._note: Per-page meta descriptions (search-result snippets). Keep them specific, keyword-rich (location, features), and unique per page.
seo.home: Liozu Villa is a whole-house B&B among the rice fields of Dongshan, Yilan. The entire 7-room villa sleeps 6–20 guests, with karaoke, a splash pool, BBQ, mahjong and a full kitchen. Pet-friendly, near the Luodong interchange and Dongshan Station.
seo.rooms: Room types at Liozu Villa, a whole-house B&B in Dongshan, Yilan: 4 double rooms and 3 quad rooms, each with a private bathroom and A/C. Shared facilities include karaoke, a splash pool, BBQ, mahjong and a kitchen.
seo.booking: Booking info for Liozu Villa, a whole-house B&B in Dongshan, Yilan: reservation steps, deposit and security deposit, check-in/out times, pet and pool fees, and house rules.
seo.location: Location and access for Liozu Villa in Dongshan, Yilan: about a 10-minute drive from the Luodong interchange (Freeway 5), a 13-minute walk from Dongshan Station, with several parking spaces.
seo.contact: Contact Liozu Villa, a whole-house B&B in Dongshan, Yilan — ask about availability and whole-house rates via LINE, Instagram or Facebook.

intro.heading: A Whole-House Villa in the Countryside
intro.text: Rice fields sway in the breeze beneath blue skies — a rare sense of calm and ease. Liozu is an entire villa just for your group, perfect for families and friends to book together and let nature recharge you.

features.title: Whole House
features.text: Book all 7 rooms for full privacy and ease.

features.title: Countryside
features.text: Surrounded by the rice fields of Dongshan, Yilan.

features.title: Entertainment
features.text: Karaoke, mahjong, splash pool and outdoor BBQ.

features.title: Pet Friendly
features.text: Bring your furry friends along for the stay.

features.title: Elevator & Accessible
features.text: An elevator and accessible spaces make it easy for elderly guests.

features.title: Self-catering Kitchen
features.text: A fully equipped kitchen for cooking your own meals.

features.title: Flexible Group Size
features.text: Book the whole house for 6–20 guests — gatherings or getaways.

features.title: Easy to Reach
features.text: Close to the Luodong Interchange and Dongshan Station — easy by car or train.

about.heading: About Us
paragraphs: Liozu sits among the rice fields of Dongshan, Yilan, where waves of paddy sway under blue skies and white clouds — a whole-house villa made for slowing down, far from the city's noise.

The entire house offers 7 double rooms, sleeping 14 as standard and up to 18 adults — ideal for families, friends and groups booking the whole place together. Inside you'll find living-room karaoke, an automatic mahjong table, an outdoor barbecue grill and a splash pool, plus a fully equipped kitchen, for good times from day to night.
Pets are welcome here too. Leave your schedule to leisure, and let nature recharge you.

map.heading: Location
map.note: Feel free to reach us on LINE for detailed directions.

intro.heading: Facilities
intro.subheading: Whole-house rental · Rooms and shared facilities

items.label: Rental
items.value: Whole-house booking only; individual rooms are not rented separately.

items.label: Rooms
value: Quad Room ×3, 1 standard double bed + 1 standard sofa bed

items.label: Bathroom
items.value: Every room has its own private bathroom, plus one shared toilet.

rooms.note: * This is a whole-house B&B; whole-house booking only. Individual rooms are not rented separately. Actual availability and rates are confirmed via LINE.

list.name: Double Room
list.description: A comfortable double room with 1 standard double bed, a private bathroom and air conditioning for a restful stay.

list.name: Quad Room
list.description: A spacious room with 1 standard double bed and 1 standard sofa bed, sleeping up to 4 — ideal for families with children.

list.name: Living Room (with Karaoke)
list.description: A spacious living room with karaoke — sing your heart out and relax with friends and family.

list.name: Kids' Play Area
list.description: A dedicated play space, with a baby cot available, where children can have fun while the grown-ups relax.

list.name: Splash Pool & BBQ Area
list.description: An outdoor splash pool — perfect for cooling off and playing in summer — plus a barbecue grill for outdoor BBQ gatherings. (Use of the splash pool costs an extra NT$1,500.)

list.name: Automatic Mahjong Table
list.description: An automatic mahjong table for fun-filled gatherings with friends and family.

list.name: Kitchen
list.description: An open kitchen fully equipped with an induction cooker and gas stove, fridge, hot & cold water dispenser, toaster oven, and tableware — everything you need to cook your own meals.

intro.heading: Reservation
intro.subheading: How to book, check-in notes, and policies

availability.heading: Availability
availability.subheading: Actual availability and rates are confirmed via LINE.
availability.error: Couldn't load availability right now — please ask via LINE.

steps: Confirm availability and pricing via LINE
Pay a 50% deposit to confirm your booking (deposit is non-refundable)
Before or on the day of check-in, pay the remaining 50% balance plus a NT$5,000 security deposit, and settle any splash-pool fee (if applicable)
After check-out, once the property is confirmed undamaged, the security deposit is refunded in full within 3 days

notes.label: Date changes
notes.desc: If your plans change, please notify us at least 7 days before check-in (or earlier). The deposit may be carried over once; late notice or more than one change forfeits the deposit with no extension.

notes.label: Balance & security deposit
notes.desc: Before or on the day of check-in, pay the remaining 50% balance plus a NT$5,000 security deposit, and settle any splash-pool fee. The deposit is fully refunded after check-out if the property is undamaged.

notes.label: Splash pool
notes.desc: Use of the splash pool costs an extra NT$1,500. Please walk slowly and watch your step around the pool; children must be supervised by an adult at all times.

notes.label: Barbecue
notes.desc: Before leaving the barbecue area, please make sure the flames are completely extinguished. Barbecue grill cleaning is currently free of charge.

notes.label: Self check-in
notes.desc: This is a self check-in stay. The kitchen is fully equipped — please use it with care and clean up thoroughly afterwards. Drain and flatten trash, sort it, and place it in the bins or trash bags.

notes.label: Pets
notes.desc: Pets are welcome — NT$300 per pet.

notes.label: Smoking
notes.desc: Non-smoking throughout; please smoke only in designated areas.

notes.label: Security & CCTV
notes.desc: CCTV cameras are installed around the exterior and shared areas for guests' safety.

notes.label: Commercial use
notes.desc: Commercial activities / filming / ceremonies require prior approval and incur additional fees.

notes.label: Prohibited
notes.desc: Drugs, brawling, and any disruptive or illegal activities are strictly prohibited; violators will be reported to the authorities.

booking.disclaimer: * Actual fees and terms are confirmed with the B&B at the time of booking.

items.label: By car
items.text: Exit National Freeway No. 5 at the Luodong Interchange, then about a 10-minute drive; several parking spaces are available.

items.label: Public transit
items.text: About a 13-minute walk from Dongshan Railway Station.
